title: break
text: break Unconditionally exit a loop initiated by for , forentity , forlist , repeat , or while . break Copy Return Values None Use Allowed in all component types. Description When used, in repeat or while loops, flow passes to the statement immediately following the nearest until or endwhile statement. This means that when a break statement appears inside several nested loops, only the innermost loop is exited. In for loops, a break statement is typically used in an if block. In this case, flow passes to the command following the endfor statement. Related Links for…endfor Define a counter-based processing loop. forentity…endfor Defines a loop that processes all the occurrences of an entity. forlist…endfor Defines a loop that processes all items in an indexed list. forlist/id…endfor Defines a loop that processes all items in an associative list of paired items. repeat Define a repeat/until loop. while Define a while/endwhile loop.
